HJRES46.reason: Resolution to terminate Trump's national emergency declaration of February 15, 2019, which he used to redirect military construction funds to build the border wall - voting Yea blocks wall funding

HR21.reason: FY2019 appropriations bill (116th Congress) that included $5.7 billion for border wall/barrier construction, the bill that preceded the government shutdown over wall funding

HJRES31.reason: DHS continuing resolution that funded the government without border wall money - Democratic bill to reopen government during the 2018-2019 shutdown without wall funding

HJRES1.reason: DHS continuing resolution for FY2019 - funded DHS without border wall appropriations, opposing Trump's demand for wall funding

HR240.reason: DHS Appropriations Act for FY2015 - Republican bill that included provisions blocking Obama's DACA executive actions and supporting border security including barriers

S4361.reason: Emergency supplemental appropriations for border security (118th) - bipartisan bill providing funding for border security infrastructure and combatting fentanyl, cloture vote

HR3401.reason: Emergency supplemental appropriations for FY2019 - included humanitarian aid for border but also some border security funding; bipartisan compromise after border crisis
